category_sources: source_facts.description: Tool for writing better scripts; official docs describe JavaScript shell scripting wrappers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official GitHub README and docs use zx.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links Documentation at google.github.io/zx; docs site has Getting Started and CLI Usage pages.
repo_sources: Official docs and GitHub pages identify google/zx as the project repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official README topics include nodejs, javascript, shell, bash, cli, child-process.
